Description: After the end of the WRC+ era, the Rally1 regulation marks a new start for top-level WRC. To create a competitive car, a pre-season prototype variant is built for testing. This prototype uses an existing monocoque chassis, suspension, and engine for cost reduction. Wheelbase has been increased to about 2600 mm, and tarmac dampers feature slightly more extension travel. The 2025 spec is set at a minimum weight of 1180 kg, without a hybrid unit and with a 35 mm restrictor.
